message:
🐛 Fix inconsistent skeleton styles between sections (#855)

Stats Overview and Cluster Info Cards used raw divs with
bg-muted-foreground/20 while dashboard cards used the shared
Skeleton component with bg-secondary/60. Refactored
ClusterCardSkeleton.tsx to use the shared Skeleton component
and fixed the filter tab skeleton color for visual consistency.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
